{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Black Dragon Key
|class_id=20223
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=Since the last Rezero War, the fallen tribe of Black Dragon has been hiding in the underground world. It is said that they have built a huge Dragon City there, and only those with the key can find the entrance to the city.
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=27
|civ=13
|tech=19
|ss1=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +10<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +20<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +30<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
}}
